title: engelhardia kinabaluensis
intro: Engelhardia kinabaluensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Juglandaceae, commonly known as a type of walnut or evergreen tree. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark and leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Engelhardia kinabaluensis include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
